title: Wheels on the Bus Song for Toddlers | Kids Cartoon #shorts
description:
BEEP BEEP! The bus goes ROUND and ROUND!
Sing the Wheels on the Bus Song with Benny in a bright toddler cartoon.
Kids hear the horn, doors, and wipers while learning safe riding words.
Fun American English nursery rhyme for preschool children ages 2-8.
#shorts #kidssongs #preschool #toddler
